gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: Missed-interval accumulation allows first caller after 50-day dormancy to extract 1.5% of entire totalTitanXBurn pool as incentive (7200x per-interval entitlement)
candidate.claimed_root_cause: _calculateIntervalsTitanXBurn accumulates all missed intervals into a single amountAllocated with no per-call incentive cap; the only guard is the totalTitanXBurn balance cap, which itself becomes the incentive base after 7200 missed intervals
candidate.claimed_impact: Unprivileged attacker extracts ~5.85 billion TitanX (~1.5% of 390B TitanX totalTitanXBurn) in a single call after 50 days of inactivity

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: Accumulates all missed intervals into a single allocation (amountPerInterval * (1 + missedIntervals)), capped only by totalTitanXBurn. After 7199 missed intervals the cap triggers and amountAllocated equals the entire totalTitanXBurn balance.

Incentive is computed as currInterval.amountAllocated * 150 / 10000 and transferred unconditionally to msg.sender. When amountAllocated equals totalTitanXBurn (cap hit), incentive equals 1.5% of the entire pool.
IntervalAlreadyBurned check only prevents replay within the same interval slot; it does not limit accumulation across missed slots and does not bound per-call incentive to a single interval share.

INCENTIVE_FEE=150, BPS_DENOM=10000, INTERVALS_PER_DAY=144, INTERVAL_TIME=600s. These fix the arithmetic: cap triggers at missedIntervals >= 7199 (50 days), amplification factor = 7200x per-interval entitlement.

attacker_inputs: Timing of call (passive: wait until block.timestamp - lastBurnedTitanXIntervalStartTimestamp > 7199 * 600 = 4,319,400 seconds ~= 50 days)
call_sequence: Wait until no caller has invoked swapTitanXForTorusAndBurn for >= 7199 intervals (50 days)
missedIntervals >= 7199; amountPerInterval * (1 + missedIntervals) >= totalTitanXBurn; cap triggers; amountAllocated = totalTitanXBurn
state_after: totalTitanXBurn decremented by totalTitanXBurn (entire pool consumed in one call)

extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: ~5,850,712,772,241,558,830,322,479,875 raw TitanX (~5.85 billion TitanX) in a single call
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Protocol totalTitanXBurn pool loses 1.5% of its entire balance to a single caller instead of distributing 1/7200 of that amount as the per-interval incentive
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: Per-interval incentive entitlement = totalTitanXBurn * 200/10000 / 144 * 150/10000 = totalTitanXBurn / 480000 ~= 812,599,204,477,994,281,985,066 raw TitanX. Attacker receives 7200x that amount (totalTitanXBurn * 150/10000) because the cap collapses all 7200 intervals into one allocation with no per-call incentive ceiling.

setup: Bind TorusBuyAndProcess at its deployed address
vm.warp(block.timestamp + 50 days) to advance past 7199 intervals
Record attacker TitanX balance before call
local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: If incentiveReceived is bounded to a single interval share regardless of elapsed time, reject. If the cap does not trigger or amountAllocated does not equal totalTitanXBurn after 50 days, reject.
